nl_query: What is the average number of active grants per faculty user?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_auxiliary_role.id) AS average_active_grants_per_user
FROM   user_auxiliary_role
JOIN   app_user ON app_user.id = user_auxiliary_role.user_id
WHERE  user_auxiliary_role.scope_type = 'GLOBAL'
  AND  user_auxiliary_role.effective_to IS NULL
  AND  user_auxiliary_role.is_active = TRUE;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): user_auxiliary_role.is_active. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
